creator: darrylo@sr.hp.com
text:
When you run "info", the description for send-pr looks something
	like:

	* Send-PR: (send-pr):   Manual for the system used to send problem
                                reports or contributions back to the FreeBSD
                                maintainers.

	The ":" after "(send-pr)" prevents info from locating the info for
	send-pr.

Fix: 

Change the ":" to ".".
How-To-Repeat: 
	Run "info" and try to access the docs for "send-pr".
